connectorUiConfig.title: NetworkLogAPI (using Sentinel Connector Builder Agent)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown:
The NetworkLogAPI connector ingests network logs and traffic events from the NetworkLogAPI platform into Microsoft Sentinel.

Supports API Key authentication.

For more information, visit [NetworkLogAPI Docs](https://netlogapigk5ldy5wtswyq.azurewebsites.net).

graphQueries.baseQuery: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | summarize count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)

sampleQueries.description: All network log events from the last 24 hours

sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | summarize count() by Severity | order by count_ desc
{{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Action in ('DENY', 'DROP') | project TimeGenerated, SourceIp, DestinationIp, DestinationPort, Protocol, Action, RuleName, Severity | order by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: High and critical severity events with threat indicators
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | where Severity in ('High', 'Critical') and isnotempty(ThreatIndicator) | project TimeGenerated, SourceIp, DestinationIp, ThreatIndicator, Category, Action, GeoCountry | order by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: Top source IPs by traffic volume
sampleQueries.query: {{graphQueriesTableName}} | summarize TotalBytesOut = sum(BytesOut), TotalBytesIn = sum(BytesIn), EventCount = count() by SourceIp | order by TotalBytesOut desc | take 20

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

customs.name: NetworkLogAPI API Key
customs.description: A NetworkLogAPI API Key is required. See the [NetworkLogAPI documentation](https://netlogapigk5ldy5wtswyq.azurewebsites.net) for details on obtaining an API Key.

instructionSteps.title: Step 1 - Obtain your NetworkLogAPI API Key
instructionSteps.description: Log in to your NetworkLogAPI account and navigate to the API settings to generate or retrieve your API Key. Refer to the [NetworkLogAPI documentation](https://netlogapigk5ldy5wtswyq.azurewebsites.net) for detailed instructions.

instructionSteps.title: Step 2 - Configure the connector
instructionSteps.description: Enter your NetworkLogAPI API Key below to establish the connection with Microsoft Sentinel.
